the highlighted section is: gobi desert

the gobi desert is one of the most famous tourist attractions in mongolia. it is a large desert located in the south of the country and is known for its unique landscapes, ancient ruins, and rich wildlife. other famous tourist attractions in mongolia include the huguun khaan mountain, the khangai mountains, and the orkhon valley. these places offer a variety of experiences, from hiking and camping to exploring historical sites and enjoying the natural beauty of the country.
